about.heading: A designer with a production mindset.
paragraphs: I'm a Senior Multimedia Designer specializing in scalable brand systems across digital, print, environmental, and internal communications. I lead design execution for enterprise-wide initiatives and build visual experiences that support organizational goals and engagement.

My path runs from the press floor to the design studio — years of prepress and digital print operations gave me a strong eye for color, typography, and the small details that decide whether a piece works in the wild.

bullets: Designed multi-channel campaigns across digital screens, social, print, and internal platforms.
Produced content supporting organization-wide initiatives, improving clarity and engagement.
Led photography and video production, overseeing studio operations and content creation.
Created layouts and visual assets for marketing campaigns, digital screens, and print collateral.
Executed designs aligned to brand standards across internal and external communications.
Designed POP signage and promotional materials used across multiple branch locations.
Produced print-ready designs and ensured accuracy across digital and offset workflows.
Collaborated with internal teams to improve file preparation efficiency and reduce errors.
Maintained brand consistency across high-volume client deliverables.
Evaluated and prepared customer files for print production — accuracy, color, and layout.
Created production-ready files and lithographic plates for offset and digital workflows.
Partnered with internal teams and vendors to maintain quality control and efficiency.
Calibrated, troubleshot, and ensured optimal print quality.
Aided sales and CSR teams with print capabilities, efficiency, and cost.
Verified spot color accuracy across brands and performed press checks for QA.
Operated three Kodak digital printers, ensuring consistent, high-quality output.
Monitored production workflows to meet deadlines and maintain efficiency.
Operated UV coating machines for high-quality healthcare prints.

contact.heading: Let's build something.
contact.lead: Open to senior multimedia roles, brand systems projects, and photo/video collaborations.
